title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explains AutoResearch, a technique from Andrej Karpathy that demonstrates iterative self-improvement applied to software development. The video argues that while not universally applicable, AutoResearch provides a novel perspective on improving software engineering practices.
